math_recheck: Re-derived against Weyl 1916 pp.328-331 (refs/weyl_LOG0036.pdf): verified |e(η)-1|=2|sin πη|, the linear geometric-series 1/|sin| bound, symbolic q-1 differencing (inner degree drops to 1, leading coeff q!α_q, α_0/α_1 cancel), lattice asymptotics n_q~(2n)^q/q! and n_{q-1}(2n+1)/n_q→q, the N-exponent sum Σj·2^{q-2-j}=Q-q, Abel summation, and ran the illustration verbatim — all confirmed. Caught the N-formula (eq.11) error.
fixes: reasoning.md:69 fixed eq-(11) N: removed spurious 2^{q-1} prefactor and corrected tail n_{q-2}n_{q-1}→n_{q-3}n_{q-2} to match Weyl p.330
reasoning.md:75 corrected 'replacing each n_i by its order n^q-ish growth' to 'replacing every n_i by n' (Weyl substitutes n_i→n, giving exponent Q-q; n^q would give q(Q-q))
answer.md:117 same N-formula fix: dropped 2^{q-1} prefactor, n_{q-2}n_{q-1}→n_{q-3}n_{q-2}
